name: list_portfolios
description: List all portfolios in the Kubera account. Use this first to find portfolio IDs for other operations. Works for single and multi-portfolio accounts.

name: get_summary
description: Get net worth summary with asset allocation and top holdings. Use this to get a quick overview of a portfolio including total assets, debts, net worth, allocation by asset class, and top 10 holdings by value.

portfolio_id.description: Portfolio ID. If not provided, auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts

name: get_portfolio_json
description: Get full portfolio data as raw JSON. Use this for complete portfolio analysis including all assets, debts, insurance, documents and detailed field values. Returns the raw API response.

portfolio_id.description: Portfolio ID. If not provided, auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts

name: list_assets
description: List all assets in a portfolio, optionally filtered by sheet (e.g., Crypto, Equities) and sorted by value, name, or gain. Use this to get a detailed view of holdings organized by asset class or category.

portfolio_id.description: Portfolio ID. If not provided, auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts

sheet.description: Filter by sheet name (e.g., Crypto, Equities, Retirement, Real Estate, Cash)

sort.description: Sort order: value (highest first), name (alphabetical), gain (highest gain first)

inputSchema.name: search_assets
inputSchema.description: Search for assets and debts by name, ticker symbol, or account. Use this to quickly find specific holdings across all sheets and categories.

query.description: Search query (name, ticker, or account name)

portfolio_id.description: Portfolio ID. If not provided, auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts

inputSchema.name: update_asset
inputSchema.description: Update an asset or debt with new values. Requires write permission API key. Common use case: updating current value of an asset. Supports updating name, value, cost, and description. Use --confirm flag to execute (not implemented here, add confirm=True to actually update).

item_id.description: Asset or debt ID to update

confirm.description: Set to true to actually execute the update
